lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What order did King Cyrus give?
answers: The people of Judah could return home and rebuild the temple
The people of Judah must be destroyed
Everyone must bow down to a statue of him
Everyone must pray only to him for 30 days

questions.text: Why did Cyrus allow the people to leave?
answers: The people of Judah paid him money
An angel spoke to him in a dream

questions.text: What was the first thing the people rebuilt?
How did the people react when the temple foundation was laid?
answers: Young people celebrated, older people wept
Young people wept, older people celebrated

questions.text: What did the people do when enemies discouraged them?
answers: They stopped building for many years
They prayed to God for help
They fought their enemies and won
Prophets who told the people to keep building

questions.text: What did the people do after hearing the prophets?
answers: They told the prophets to be quiet

questions.text: What did Governor Tattenai ask the workers?
answers: Who gave you permission to build?
Why are you working so slowly?

questions.text: What happened after Tattenai wrote to King Darius?
answers: They found Cyrus’s order allowing the work
The king sent his soldiers to attack

questions.text: What did the people do after the king's order was found?
